title: AOMIG Heart Shaped Candlestick Holders, Personalized Wooden Candle Holder Friendship Gifts for Women, Best Friend Birthday Gifts, Unique Gifts for Friend
features: 【EXPRESSING FRIENDSHIP TO YOUR BEST FRIEND】Two candlesticks of different lengths can also form a perfect heart shape, just like you and your best friend are two separate individuals who care for each other. Surprise your bestie with this gift and melt her heart!

【HEART-SHAPED DESIGN】Two candle holders are combined into a heart-shaped decoration of love, and two separate tea lamp holders form a lovely heart shape, and the delicate hollow design makes a perfect heart shape.

【LOG MATERIAL】The candle holder is made of natural wood. The two individual tea lamp holders are carefully designed in solid wood and feature individual engravings. The size is 12*9*4.5cm (removable). The candlestick contains 2 candles.

【HOME DECORATION】The lovely tea light candle holder can not only be used as a stand, but also an elegant artwork in home decoration. With this candle holder, every corner of the home becomes warm and romantic.

【BEST FRIEND GIFT】You can light a heart-shaped hollow candle holder for candlelight dinner and tell her how special she is to you. This candle holder is the best helper to express your sincere emotions and make it a testimony of your friendship.
description: Features: High-quality material, smooth and not scratchy, healthy and natural.
